首页> 师资队伍
师资队伍
发布时间：2025-09-15
姓名：
邓方
职称：
教授
导师类型：
博士生导师
学科方向：
智能科技与技术,控制科学与工程
电子邮件：
dengfang@bit.edu.cn

个人信息

邓方，北京理工大学研究生院常务副院长，人工智能学院常务副院长，教授，博士生导师，国家杰出青年科学基金获得者，IEEE FELLOW。主要从事群体智能、智能群系统、可穿戴泛在系统等研究。承担国家自然科学基金杰青、重点项目、新一代人工智能国家科技重大专项项目、科技部重点研发课题、国家重点领域项目等多项。发表学术论文210余篇，授权中国发明专利140件，美国发明专利4件，出版专著、教材各1部。获国家科技进步二等奖、国防科技进步一等奖、二等奖、中国青年科技奖、北京市杰出青年中关村奖、日内瓦国际发明展金奖、北京高校优质本科课程（重点）主讲教师等省部级及以上科研、教学奖励10余项。担任中国自动化学会常务理事，副秘书长，中国自动化学会和中国指挥与控制学会多个专委会副主任，IEEE FELLOW，IEEE TSMCS、TNNLS、TFS、《自动化学报》等期刊编委。欢迎有志于人工智能与智能控制领域的青年才俊加入我们开展硕士、博士、博士后研究，希望你具有人工智能、自动化、计算机、数学等相关专业背景，基础知识扎实，勇于探索未知，愿意从事多学科交叉创新研究。

代表性成果

  1. 邓方编著，可穿戴泛在能源系统及控制，科学出版社，2021.4，国家科学技术学术著作出版基金支持.

  2. Huang Weiwen, Liang Li, Xu Ningsheng, Deng Fang*, Dominance regions of pursuit-evasion games in non-anticipative information patterns, Automatica, 2025, 176: 112258.

  3. Xu Ningsheng, Huang Weiwen, Liang Li, Deng Fang*, Optimal Strategies of a Two-lifeline Differential Game, IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control, 2024, 70(4): 2591-2598.

  4. Zhu Jiaqi, Cai Shaofeng, Deng Fang*, Ooi Beng Chin, Wu Junran, Do LLMs Understand Visual Anomalies? Uncovering LLM's Capabilities in Zero-shot Anomaly Detection, Proceedings of the 32nd ACM International Conference on Multimedia, 2024: 48-57.

  5. Sun Zhihao, Liu Yang, Zhang Lele, Deng Fang*, AGCG: Air–Ground Collaboration Geolocation Based on Visual Servo With Uncalibrated Cameras, IEEE Transactions on Industrial Electronics, 2024, 71(11): 14410-14419.

  6. Shi Xiang, Deng Fang*, Guo Miao, Zhao Jiachen, Ma Lin, Xin Bin, Chen Jie, A Novel Fulfillment-Focused Simultaneous Assignment Method for Large-Scale Order Picking Optimization Problem in RMFS, IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems, 2024, 54(2): 1226-1238.

  7. Ding Ning, Cai Yeyun, Deng Fang*, Temperature-based thermo-electric coupling maximum power point tracking algorithm for thermoelectric generation systems under transient conditions, Applied Thermal Engineering, 2023, 230(Part A): 120684.

  8. Zhao Jiachen, Deng Fang*, Zhu Jiaqi, Chen Jie, Searching Density-increasing Path to Local Density Peaks for Unsupervised Anomaly Detection, IEEE Transactions on Big Data, 2023, 9(4): 1198-1209.

  9. Gao Feng, Cai Yeyun, Deng Fang*, Yu Chengpu, and Chen Jie, Feature Alignment in Anchor-Free Object Detection, IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology, 2023, 33(8): 3799-3810.

  10. Gao Xin, Deng Fang*, Wu Guoqiang, Pan Qiufeng, Zheng Chengyu, Wang Wei, Cai Tianwang, Jiang  Liyuan, Divide and Conquer Q-Learning (DCQL) algorithm based Photovoltaic (PV) array reconfiguration scheme for alleviating the partial shading influence, Solar Energy, 2023, 249: 21-39.

  11. Liang Li, Deng Fang*, Wang Jianan, Lu Maobin, Chen Jie, A Reconnaissance Penetration Game With Territorial-Constrained Defender, IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control, 2022, 67(11): 6295-302.

  12. Zhang Lele, Gao Feng, Deng Fang*, Xi Lele, Chen Jie. Distributed Estimation of a Layered Architecture for Collaborative Air-Ground Target Geolocation in Outdoor Environments, IEEE Transactions on Industrial Electronics, 2023, 70(3): 2822-2832.

  13. Cai Yeyun, A. Rezania, Deng Fang*, L. Rosendahl, Chen Jie, Comprehensive experimental study of thermoelectric generators under transient boundary conditions, Energy Conversion and Management, 2021, 245(2), 114561.

  14. Zhao Jiachen, Deng Fang*, Li Yongling, Chen Jie. Attract-Repel Encoder: Learning Anomaly Representation Away From Landmarks, IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems, 2022, 33(6): 2466-2479.

  15. Shi Xiang, Deng Fang*, Fan Yunfeng, Ma Lin, Wang Yong, Chen Jie. A two-stage hybrid heuristic algorithm for the simultaneous order and rack assignment problem, IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering, 2022, 19(4): 2955-2967.

  16. Gao Feng, Deng Fang*, Li Linhan, Zhang Lele, Zhu Jiaqi, and Yu Chengpu. MGG: Monocular Global Geolocation for Outdoor Long-Range Targets, IEEE Transactions on Image Processing, 2021, 30: 6349-6363.

  17. Cai Yeyun, Deng Fang*, Zhao Jiachen, Ding Ning, Chen Jie, An MPTD-specialized MPPT algorithm used for a novel medium-power thermoelectric system, IEEE Transactions on Power Electronics, 2021, 36(4): 4187-4197.

  18. Liang Li, Deng Fang*, Lu Maobin, Chen Jie. Analysis of role switch for cooperative target defense differential game, IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control, 2021, 66(2): 902-909.

  19. Li Liang, Deng Fang*, Peng Zhihong*, Xinxing Li, Wenzhong Zha, A differential game for cooperative target defense, Automatica, 2019, 102: 58-71.

  20. Zhang Lele, Deng Fang*, Chen Jie,  Bi Yingcai, Phang Swee King , Xudong Chen. Trajectory planning for improving vision-based target geolocation performance using a quad-rotor UAV, IEEE Transactions on Aerospace and Electronic Systems, 2019, 55(5): 2382-2394.

承担科研项目

  1. 智能火力控制系统，2021.1-2025.12，国家杰出青年科学基金项目.

  2. 多智能体博弈智能技术及示范应用，2023.3-2026.2，新一代人工智能国家科技重大专项项目.

  3. 能量魔方—面向无源物联网的泛在能源收集与融合系统关键技术，2023.10-2027.12，北京市自然科学基金-小米创新联合基金重点研究专题项目.

  4. 基于泛在能源的可穿戴传感网基础理论与关键技术，2020.1-2024.12，国家自然科学基金重点项目.

  5. 智能感知与学习决策，2020.12-2025.12，基础加强课题.

  6. 数据驱动的服务机器人智能行为全过程评估，2020.11-2023.10，国家重点研发计划子课题. 

  7. 基于时空神经网络的精细化空气质量和能见度预测系统，2021.5-2022.5，国家气象局.


地址：北京市海淀区中关村南大街5号北京理工大学

学院邮箱：ai@bit.edu.cn

友情链接

党委宣传部 研究生院 计划财务部 科学技术研究院 资产与实验室管理处
